mcq:
I _____ TV when the phone rang.
a) watch b) was watching c) watched d) am watching

She _____ to school yesterday.
a) goes b) went c) was going d) is going
tf: We use past continuous for actions interrupted by another action in the past. [True/False]
I was go to the market yesterday. [True/False]
short: Write a sentence using 'while I was studying'
Change to past continuous: She cooks dinner

mcq:
Mount Everest is _____ than Kilimanjaro.
a) high b) higher c) highest d) more high

This is the _____ book I have ever read.
a) good b) better c) best d) most good
tf: We add 'more' before long adjectives in comparative. [True/False]
short: Write the comparative and superlative of 'beautiful', 'big', 'bad'
Make a sentence using 'the most interesting'
long: Compare two cities using comparatives and superlatives

mcq:
I _____ to Paris three times.
a) go b) went c) have gone d) was going

She _____ her homework yesterday.
a) has done b) did c) does d) is doing
tf: We use present perfect for actions at an unspecified time in the past. [True/False]
I have seen that movie yesterday. [True/False]
short: Change to present perfect: I eat lunch

mcq:
Eating too much sugar can cause:
a) Strong bones b) Obesity c) Good eyesight d) Energy

We should exercise to keep our body:
a) Weak b) Fit c) Sick d) Tired
tf: Drinking water is important for health. [True/False]
Staying up late every night is healthy. [True/False]
short: Give 3 tips for a healthy lifestyle
What do you usually eat for breakfast?
long: Write about how to stay healthy

mcq:
I think it _____ tomorrow.
a) rains b) is raining c) will rain d) rained

We _____ a party next week. We have already planned it.
a) will have b) are having c) have d) had
tf: We use 'going to' for plans and intentions. [True/False]
'Will' is used for predictions based on evidence. [True/False]
short: Make a prediction about the weather tomorrow
Write a sentence about your plan for next summer

mcq:
The car _____ in Japan.
a) make b) makes c) is made d) was made

The homework _____ by the students now.
a) do b) does c) is being done d) was done
tf: In passive voice, the object becomes the subject. [True/False]
We use 'be' + past participle to form the passive. [True/False]
short: Change to passive: They build houses quickly
Write a sentence in passive present perfect

mcq:
He said, 'I am busy'. → He said that he _____ busy.
a) am b) was c) is d) were

'Where do you live?' → She asked me where I _____ .
a) live b) lived c) am living d) was living
tf: In reported speech, we move the tense one step back. [True/False]
short: Change to reported question: 'Do you like coffee?'

mcq:
The internet helps us _____ information quickly.
a) lose b) hide c) share d) forget

Social media can be _____ if not used carefully.
a) useful b) dangerous c) easy d) cheap
tf: Technology has no effect on education. [True/False]
short: Name 3 advantages and 2 disadvantages of the internet
How do you use technology in your daily life?
long: Write an essay about the role of technology in modern life
